title: Power Electronics Summit 2025
description: An in-depth summit covering the latest advances in power electronics, motor drives, and energy conversion systems. Industry experts and academic researchers share cutting-edge research.

title: Industrial Automation Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop on PLC programming, SCADA systems, and industrial IoT integration. Participants will work through real-world automation scenarios.

title: Factory Visit – STEG Sfax
description: A guided tour of the STEG electrical power generation facility in Sfax. Members will observe energy production processes and meet industry professionals.

title: IEEE Day Celebration & Career Fair
description: Celebrate IEEE Day with networking sessions, a career fair featuring top engineering companies, and award ceremonies for outstanding student contributions.

title: Renewable Energy Seminar
description: A comprehensive seminar on solar, wind, and hydrogen energy systems, featuring presentations from leading researchers in the MENA region.
